name: The Platform Engineer
effect: Absorb all unassigned technical debt and undocumented dependencies. This card is considered foundational.

clauses.name: LOAD-BEARING CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a system fails: This card is considered responsible regardless of ownership.

clauses.name: THANKLESS WORK EFFECT
clauses.rule: When this card resolves an incident: No stakeholder is updated.

clauses.name: DEPRECATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a tool is deprecated: This card continues to operate it until something worse replaces it.

witness_quote: I don't know who owns this.
